course.name_zh: AI 时代的社交媒体全渠道（Omnichannel）营销
course.subtitle_zh: 一日工作坊 · 把 Facebook / Instagram / TikTok / 小红书 / WhatsApp Business 串成一条会自己跑的销售流水线
course.subtitle_en: One-Day Workshop — Turn Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Xiaohongshu and WhatsApp Business into one self-running sales pipeline.
course.format_zh: 一日线下工作坊（8 小时，含午休 60 分钟）
course.format_en: One-Day In-Person Workshop (8 hours, incl. 60-min lunch)
course.language: 中文为主，关键术语中英对照

highlights_zh: 一天搞懂数字营销 + Omnichannel 全渠道打法，不再被一个平台绑死
现场用 AI 工具批量生成文案、海报、短视频，当天就能带走素材
把 FB / IG / TikTok / 小红书 / WhatsApp Business 拉成一条完整客户旅程
学会用 AI 工作流把每周营销时间从 20 小时压到 5 小时以内
结业带走一份属于你自己生意的『90 天 Omnichannel 营销行动计划』
highlights_en: Master Digital Marketing + Omnichannel strategy in one day — stop depending on a single platform.
Generate copy, posters and short videos with AI on-site — walk out with usable assets the same day.
Connect Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Xiaohongshu and WhatsApp Business into one customer journey.
Build AI workflows that cut weekly marketing time from 20 hours down to under 5.
Leave with your own 90-day Omnichannel marketing action plan.
audience_zh: 企业老板 / 创始人 — 想让营销成为可复制的系统，而不是靠一个员工撑着
创业者 / 个体商家 — 一个人要管所有平台，需要 AI 当『分身』
市场部 / 品牌经理 — 想用 AI 全面升级团队的内容产能与投放效率
销售团队 / 业务经理 — 希望线上引流到 WhatsApp 后能稳定成交
想提升上线业绩、苦于不会做内容的传统行业从业者
audience_en: Business owners & founders — turn marketing into a repeatable system, not one person's headache.
Solo entrepreneurs — let AI act as your team across every platform.
Marketing & brand managers — upgrade content output and ad efficiency with AI.
Sales managers — convert online leads into WhatsApp deals consistently.
Traditional-industry professionals who need to grow online but struggle with content.

features_zh.title: 针对吉隆坡本地市场
features_zh.desc: 案例和工具全部围绕 FB / IG / TikTok / 小红书（华人圈）/ WhatsApp Business，不讲在马来西亚用不上的平台。

features_zh.title: 实操为主，理论为辅
features_zh.desc: 6 个模块，每个模块都有 AI 实操环节，自带电脑当天就能跑出真实素材。

features_zh.title: 全渠道而非单平台
features_zh.desc: 不教你『怎么发一条 IG』，教你怎么让 5 个平台互相导流、最终在 WhatsApp 成交。

features_zh.title: AI 工作流，不是 AI 玩具
features_zh.desc: 重点是『可重复的流程』，让一个人能干以前一个团队的活。

features_zh.title: 结业带走行动方案
features_zh.desc: 最后一个模块一对一辅导，每个学员带走一份适合自己生意的 90 天落地计划。

features_en.title: Built for the KL market
features_en.desc: Every example uses FB / IG / TikTok / Xiaohongshu (Chinese community) / WhatsApp Business — no platforms that don't matter in Malaysia.

features_en.title: Hands-on first, theory second
features_en.desc: Each of the 6 modules includes AI hands-on practice. Bring a laptop, leave with real assets.

features_en.title: Omnichannel, not single-channel
features_en.desc: Not 'how to post on IG' — but how 5 platforms feed each other and close in WhatsApp.

features_en.title: AI workflow, not AI toy
features_en.desc: Focus on repeatable pipelines so one person can do what used to take a team.

features_en.title: Leave with an action plan
features_en.desc: The final module is 1-on-1 coaching — each attendee walks out with their own 90-day rollout plan.

modules.title_zh: 数字营销 & Omnichannel 入门
modules.summary_zh: 看清今天客户从哪来、到哪去，建立全渠道作战地图。
modules.summary_en: See where customers come from and where they go — build the omnichannel map.
learning_goals_zh: 区分『单平台思维』和『全渠道思维』的本质差异，并能用一句话讲给员工听
画出自己生意当前的客户旅程图（认知 → 兴趣 → 信任 → 成交 → 复购）
判断 FB / IG / TikTok / 小红书 / WhatsApp 在马来西亚市场各自适合的角色
找出自己业务最薄弱的 1 个渠道环节，作为后续 5 个模块的优化目标
learning_goals_en: Articulate the difference between single-channel and omnichannel thinking — in one sentence your staff can repeat.
Map your business's current customer journey: Awareness → Interest → Trust → Purchase → Retention.
Decide what role each platform plays in the KL market: FB / IG / TikTok / Xiaohongshu / WhatsApp Business.
Identify the single weakest link in your funnel — the focus for the rest of the workshop.
topics_zh: 数字营销 vs 传统营销：从『砸广告』到『建系统』的根本转变
Omnichannel vs Multichannel：客户在哪里，品牌就在哪里
5 阶段客户旅程：Awareness → Interest → Trust → Purchase → Retention
吉隆坡市场各平台用户画像与适用场景（华人 vs 马来 vs 印度社群差异）
AOM 漏斗模型：Awareness 引流、Opportunity 蓄水、Money 成交
平台分工原则：哪些平台负责『被发现』、哪些负责『被信任』、哪些负责『成交』
topics_en: Digital vs traditional marketing: from 'buying ads' to 'building systems'.
Omnichannel vs multichannel: be where the customer is, not where you prefer.
The 5-stage customer journey: Awareness → Interest → Trust → Purchase → Retention.
KL platform demographics — Chinese / Malay / Indian community differences across FB, IG, TikTok, Xiaohongshu, WhatsApp.
The AOM funnel: Awareness, Opportunity, Money.
Platform roles: which channels create discovery, which build trust, which close the sale.

hands_on_zh.task_zh: 现场画出自己生意的『Omnichannel 现状图』
steps_zh: 用 A4 客户旅程模板，画出现有的 5 阶段流程
在 5 大平台地图上标注：哪些已在用、哪些是空白、哪些虽在用但效果差
圈出最薄弱的 1 个环节（多数老板会发现：流量进来了但没沉淀）
同桌互相 review 5 分钟，挑战对方的判断
hands_on_zh.deliverable_zh: 一张完整的『我的 Omnichannel 现状图』，作为后续模块的诊断基线

hands_on_en.task_en: Draft your own 'Omnichannel Current-State Map' on paper.
steps_en: Fill in the 5-stage customer journey template (A4).
Mark each of the 5 platforms: actively using / not using / using but underperforming.
Circle the single weakest link (most owners discover traffic comes in but never gets captured).
Pair up for a 5-minute peer review — challenge each other's assumptions.
hands_on_en.deliverable_en: A completed Omnichannel Current-State Map — your diagnostic baseline for the rest of the day.

best_for_zh: 企业老板 / 创始人 — 第一次看清自己的全盘营销结构
想提升上线业绩的传统行业从业者 — 找到从『线下生意』迁移到线上的入口
best_for_en: Business owners & founders — get a full-picture view of your marketing structure for the first time.
Traditional-industry professionals moving online — find the entry point from offline to digital.

modules.summary_zh: 用内容支柱和节奏表，让你不再每天临时想发什么。
modules.summary_en: Use content pillars and a posting cadence so you stop scrambling each morning.
learning_goals_zh: 用『内容支柱 (Content Pillars)』框架定义自己品牌的 3–5 个固定内容方向
制定一份可以持续执行 30 天的内容节奏表（什么时候发、发什么、谁来发）
区分种草内容、转化内容、维护内容三种不同写法，并能各举一例
学会从竞品和行业 KOL 那里反向拆解爆款内容结构，而不是凭灵感发帖
learning_goals_en: Define your brand's 3–5 Content Pillars using a structured framework.
Build a 30-day content cadence sheet (what to post, when, by whom).
Distinguish discovery content vs conversion content vs retention content — write one of each.
Reverse-engineer winning posts from competitors and KOLs, instead of relying on inspiration.
topics_zh: 内容支柱 (Content Pillars)：3–5 个固定主题轮播，避免『每天想破头』
60-30-10 黄金比例：60% 教育 / 30% 娱乐共鸣 / 10% 直接促销
平台内容特性差异：FB 长图文、IG 视觉、TikTok 钩子、小红书干货、WhatsApp 私域
钩子 / 价值 / CTA 三段式结构（前 3 秒留人 → 中段交付 → 末尾行动）
用『搜索词』反推内容选题：从客户实际在 Google / 小红书搜什么出发
内容节奏表：周更频次、最佳发布时段（KL 时区）、谁负责拍 / 谁负责发
topics_en: Content Pillars: 3–5 recurring themes so you stop reinventing the wheel daily.
The 60-30-10 ratio: 60% educational / 30% entertaining-relatable / 10% direct promotion.
Platform-native content: FB long-form, IG visual, TikTok hook-driven, Xiaohongshu knowledge-dense, WhatsApp private.
The Hook / Value / CTA three-act structure (first 3s retention → middle delivery → closing action).
Search-driven topic selection: start from what customers actually type into Google or Xiaohongshu.
Cadence sheet: weekly frequency, best posting times (KL timezone), who shoots vs who publishes.

hands_on_zh.task_zh: 为自己品牌产出一份『内容支柱卡 + 30 天节奏表』
steps_zh: 用模板填写自己品牌的 3–5 个内容支柱（每根支柱写 1 句定义 + 3 个选题）
拆解 2 个本行业或邻近行业的 IG / TikTok 爆款，提炼出可复制的结构（钩子 / 价值 / CTA）
把内容支柱铺到 30 天日历上，标注每天发什么平台、什么类型
同桌互相点评：内容支柱是否清晰？60-30-10 比例是否失衡？
hands_on_zh.deliverable_zh: 1 张内容支柱卡 + 1 份未来 30 天的内容节奏表（Excel/Google Sheet 草稿）

hands_on_en.task_en: Produce your brand's Content Pillar Card + 30-Day Cadence Sheet.
steps_en: Use the template to define 3–5 content pillars (1-line definition + 3 topics each).
Reverse-engineer 2 viral IG/TikTok posts from your industry — extract the Hook/Value/CTA structure.
Lay the pillars onto a 30-day calendar: which platform, which content type, which day.
Peer review with the person next to you: are the pillars clear? Is the 60-30-10 ratio balanced?
hands_on_en.deliverable_en: 1 Content Pillar Card + 1 draft 30-Day Cadence Sheet (Excel / Google Sheet).

best_for_zh: 创业者 / 个体商家 — 一个人扛所有平台，需要节奏表才不至于断更
市场部 / 品牌经理 — 把团队的内容产出标准化、规模化
best_for_en: Solo entrepreneurs — running every platform alone, you need a cadence to avoid burnout.
Marketing & brand managers — standardise and scale team content output.

modules.summary_zh: 现场用 AI 批量产出文案、图片、海报、短视频。
modules.summary_en: Generate copy, images, posters and short videos with AI — live, on-site.
tools_used: Canva (含 Magic Studio AI 套件)
CapCut（含 AI 配音 + 自动字幕）
learning_goals_zh: 用 ChatGPT 或 Claude 在 10 分钟内产出符合『内容支柱卡』的 5 条文案变体
用 Midjourney 或 Nano Banana 生成符合品牌调性的产品图 / 海报底图（保持一致性）
用 Canva 把 AI 文案 + AI 图片组装成 IG / 小红书可直接发布的成图
用 CapCut 把 AI 文案 + AI 配音 + 素材剪成一条 30 秒短视频
learning_goals_en: Generate 5 caption variants aligned to your Content Pillar Card in under 10 minutes — using ChatGPT or Claude.
Produce on-brand product / poster images with Midjourney or Nano Banana, with consistent style.
Assemble AI copy + AI images into ready-to-post IG and Xiaohongshu graphics in Canva.
Cut a 30-second short video in CapCut using AI voiceover, auto-captions, and your AI assets.
topics_zh: AI 文案 Prompt 公式：身份 + 场景 + 受众 + 内容支柱 + 输出格式
图像生成的品牌一致性：Style Reference / Character Reference 怎么用
把 AI 当『初稿生成器』、人当『最后把关人』的分工原则
一稿多发：用一篇长文裂变成 FB / IG / TikTok / 小红书 4 个平台的不同版本
AI 配音 + 自动字幕：让短视频成本从『拍摄团队』降到『一台电脑』
AI 内容的版权、合规与平台规则边界（马来西亚视角）
topics_en: The AI copy prompt formula: Role + Context + Audience + Content Pillar + Output Format.
Brand consistency in image generation: how to use Style Reference and Character Reference.
Treat AI as a 'first-draft generator' and humans as the 'final gatekeeper'.
One-source / multi-platform: split one long post into native versions for FB, IG, TikTok and Xiaohongshu.
AI voiceover + auto-captions: drop short-video production cost from a film crew to one laptop.
Copyright, compliance and platform-rule edges for AI content (Malaysia perspective).

hands_on_zh.task_zh: 现场跑通『1 个内容支柱 → 4 平台素材包』的完整 AI 生产流水
steps_zh: 步骤 1（15 min）— 把 M2 写好的内容支柱喂给 ChatGPT / Claude，用三段式 Prompt 模板生成 5 条 IG 长文案 + 3 条 TikTok 钩子句
步骤 2（15 min）— 在 Midjourney 或 Nano Banana 用 Style Reference 生成 3 张品牌一致的产品 / 场景图，导出 PNG
步骤 3（15 min）— 在 Canva 套用品牌模板，把 AI 文案 + AI 图片做成 1 张 IG 帖 + 1 张小红书封面
步骤 4（15 min）— 在 CapCut 用 AI 配音 + 自动字幕 + 已有素材剪一条 30 秒短视频，导出竖版 9:16
hands_on_zh.deliverable_zh: 1 套完整的『1 篇内容 · 跨 4 平台』素材包：5 条文案变体 + 3 张图 + 1 张 IG 帖 + 1 张小红书封面 + 1 条 30 秒视频

hands_on_en.task_en: Run the full 'one pillar → four-platform asset pack' AI pipeline live.
steps_en: Step 1 (15 min) — Feed your M2 Content Pillar into ChatGPT / Claude, use the 3-part prompt template to produce 5 IG captions + 3 TikTok hook lines.
Step 2 (15 min) — In Midjourney or Nano Banana, use Style Reference to generate 3 brand-consistent product/scene images and export as PNG.
Step 3 (15 min) — In Canva, apply your brand template to combine AI copy + AI images into 1 IG post and 1 Xiaohongshu cover.
Step 4 (15 min) — In CapCut, build a 30-second 9:16 short video with AI voiceover, auto-captions and your assets.
hands_on_en.deliverable_en: Full asset pack: 5 caption variants + 3 brand images + 1 IG post + 1 Xiaohongshu cover + 1 thirty-second video.

best_for_zh: 创业者 / 个体商家 — 一个人也能撑起以前一个团队的内容产出
市场部 / 品牌经理 — 用 AI 把团队产能放大 5 倍，预算花在更关键的环节
best_for_en: Solo entrepreneurs — match a full team's content output on your own.
Marketing & brand managers — 5x your team's throughput and redirect budget to higher-leverage work.

modules.summary_zh: 现场轻社交，互相加好友。

modules.title_zh: 多平台联动 — 把 5 个渠道连成一条线
modules.title_en: Cross-Platform Funnel — Connect 5 Channels Into One
modules.summary_zh: FB / IG / TikTok / 小红书 / WhatsApp 串成完整客户旅程。
modules.summary_en: Wire FB, IG, TikTok, Xiaohongshu and WhatsApp into one customer journey.
tools_used: WhatsApp Business（Catalog / Quick Reply / Auto Greeting / Labels）
Meta Business Suite（FB + IG 一体化管理）
learning_goals_zh: 为自己业务画出『5 平台漏斗图』，明确每个平台是拉新、蓄水还是成交
跑通『公域曝光 → 私域沉淀 → WhatsApp 成交』的完整闭环
配置 IG / FB / TikTok 三家 bio 加 link-in-bio，做到『一个链接打通所有渠道』
在 WhatsApp Business 上线 Catalog、自动欢迎语、Quick Reply 三件套
learning_goals_en: Draw your 5-platform funnel: which channel acquires, which nurtures, which closes.
Wire up the full loop: public-channel reach → private-channel capture → WhatsApp conversion.
Configure IG / FB / TikTok bios with a link-in-bio so one click reaches every channel.
Launch WhatsApp Business essentials: Catalog, auto-greeting, and Quick Replies.
topics_zh: Omnichannel 漏斗实战版：FB / IG / TikTok 公域曝光 → 小红书种草 → WhatsApp Business 成交
Link-in-bio 策略：Linktree vs Stan Store vs 自建落地页，KL 市场怎么选
IG / TikTok 引流到 WhatsApp 的合规打法（避免被限流的 3 个雷区）
WhatsApp Business 三大利器：Catalog 商品橱窗 / Quick Reply 快速回复 / Auto Greeting 自动欢迎
私域沉淀：把流量从『平台租户』变成『自己资产』
UTM 跟踪：每个平台到底带来多少客户、哪条内容真的成交了
topics_en: Live-fire omnichannel funnel: FB/IG/TikTok reach → Xiaohongshu nurture → WhatsApp Business close.
Link-in-bio strategy: Linktree vs Stan Store vs your own landing page — what works in KL.
Compliant ways to drive IG/TikTok traffic to WhatsApp without getting throttled (3 traps to avoid).
WhatsApp Business essentials: product Catalog, Quick Replies, and Auto Greeting.
Building a private-channel asset: convert renters of platform attention into owners of customer relationships.
UTM tracking: which platform actually drives revenue, which content actually converts.

hands_on_zh.task_zh: 为自己业务搭建一条可立刻运行的『5 平台 → WhatsApp』转化闭环
steps_zh: 步骤 1（10 min）— 画出自己业务的 5 平台漏斗图，给每个平台贴标签（拉新 / 蓄水 / 转化 / 复购）
步骤 2（15 min）— 现场配置 Linktree（或 Stan Store），把 5 个平台 + WhatsApp 串到一个 link-in-bio 链接里，并把链接更新到 IG / TikTok bio
步骤 3（15 min）— 登录 WhatsApp Business，上架 5 件 Catalog 商品 + 设置自动欢迎语 + 写 3 条 Quick Reply（咨询价格 / 询问营业时间 / 索取目录）
步骤 4（10 min）— 写 1 条『从 IG 或 TikTok 引流到 WhatsApp』的合规 CTA 文案，并贴到 IG bio 或 highlight 上
hands_on_zh.deliverable_zh: 1 张 5 平台漏斗图 + 1 个上线的 link-in-bio 页面 + 1 个配置完成的 WhatsApp Business 商业账号

hands_on_en.task_en: Build a live, runnable '5 platforms → WhatsApp' conversion loop for your own business.
steps_en: Step 1 (10 min) — Draw your 5-platform funnel and tag each platform: acquire / nurture / convert / retain.
Step 2 (15 min) — Set up Linktree (or Stan Store), connect all 5 platforms + WhatsApp into one link-in-bio, and update IG / TikTok bios with the new link.
Step 3 (15 min) — In WhatsApp Business: upload 5 Catalog items, set the auto-greeting message, and write 3 Quick Replies (price inquiry / hours / catalog request).
Step 4 (10 min) — Write one compliant CTA caption that drives IG or TikTok traffic into WhatsApp, and publish it to your IG bio or highlight.
hands_on_en.deliverable_en: 1 funnel diagram + 1 live link-in-bio page + 1 fully configured WhatsApp Business account.

best_for_zh: 销售团队 / 业务经理 — 把线上流量稳定转化成 WhatsApp 询单
企业老板 / 创始人 — 拉通公司所有渠道的成交闭环，不再让流量白白流失
best_for_en: Sales managers — turn online traffic into a steady stream of WhatsApp inquiries.
Business owners & founders — close the loop across every channel so leaks stop wasting traffic.

modules.summary_zh: 把每周营销时间从 20 小时压到 5 小时的可复用流程。
modules.summary_en: Reusable pipelines that cut weekly marketing time from 20 hours to under 5.

modules.title_zh: 落地行动 — 你的 90 天计划
modules.summary_zh: 一对一辅导，带走属于你自己生意的营销行动计划。
modules.summary_en: 1-on-1 coaching — leave with a 90-day plan tailored to your own business.
